title: angelica pyrenaea
intro: Angelica pyrenaea, also known as Pyrenean angelica, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae), native to the Pyrenees mountain range between France and Spain. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Angelica pyrenaea include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Angelica pyrenaea can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
